sprint.title: Early Alpha UX v1: Alpha Messaging + Stripe Sandbox Disclaimer (Bold) + Landing Page Alpha Notice
sprint.goal: Make it unmistakably clear that Memorioso is in Early Alpha and that payments are running in Stripe Test Mode (sandbox) — no real money is taken. Show consistent alpha messaging across app + landing page, and enhance Upgrade modal with a friendly test card helper.
definitionOfDone: Landing page clearly shows 'Early Alpha' status (badge + short explanation) with a FAQ entry
App shows an Early Alpha indicator (badge/banner) with consistent messaging and a 'What does this mean?' link
Upgrade modal includes bold, large text stating: 'Sandbox / Test Mode — No real money will be taken'
Upgrade modal includes friendly test card guidance (test card number, future date, any CVC/postcode) and links to Stripe testing docs
Billing endpoints are guarded to ensure test-mode keys are used (BILLING_MODE=test) and UI messaging matches
Users can dismiss non-critical banners (optional), but Upgrade modal disclaimer is always visible
Copy is elder-friendly and avoids jargon
QA + tests ensure alpha/sandbox warnings show in test mode and do not show in live mode (future flip)

stackAssumptions.backend: Convex + Next.js route handlers for Stripe

backlog.title: Define Alpha messaging policy + placement map (app + landing) and single-source copy

copy.alphaBlurbShort: Early Alpha — features may change. Your feedback helps us improve.
alphaInfoBody: Some features are still being refined.
You might see rough edges or changes.
Your feedback is valuable and helps shape the product.

placements: Landing: FAQ entry 'Is this product in alpha?'
App: optional dismissible banner on dashboard/studio entry

acceptanceTests: Single copy file exists and is used by both landing and app UI

backlog.title: Landing page update: Early Alpha badge + short notice + FAQ entry

hero: Add a visible 'Early Alpha' pill/badge near the hero headline
Add one short line under hero: alphaBlurbShort
Optional: add link 'Learn more' that scrolls to FAQ or opens a modal

faq.a: Yes — we’re in Early Alpha. Some features may change as we learn from early users. Your feedback helps us improve.
During alpha, payments run in sandbox/test mode — no real money is taken.

constraints: Do not overwhelm the page; keep it subtle but visible
No layout shift from added elements

acceptanceTests: Landing clearly displays Early Alpha status above the fold

backlog.title: Add Early Alpha UI components in app (badge + banner + info modal) with preference storage

behavior: Banner can be dismissed for 30 days (localStorage) or per-user (optional)

acceptanceTests: Badge visible on all app pages
Info modal opens and renders correctly

backlog.title: Upgrade modal: bold sandbox/test-mode disclaimer + friendly test card helper

disclaimerCopy: No real money will be taken.
Use a Stripe test card to complete checkout.
visualRules: Large + bold headline inside Upgrade modal
constraints: Do not encourage using real card details

acceptanceTests: Disclaimer + test card helper appear in Upgrade modal in test mode
They do not appear in live mode config

backlog.title: Backend guardrails: enforce BILLING_MODE=test consistency (keys/priceIds/webhooks) + expose safe mode flag

guards: BILLING_MODE=test must use STRIPE_SECRET_KEY_TEST + test price IDs

acceptanceTests: UI sandbox messaging follows backend mode flag

backlog.title: QA + automated tests: landing alpha notice + upgrade sandbox visibility rules

manualChecklist: Landing shows Early Alpha badge and FAQ entries
Upgrade modal shows bold sandbox disclaimer in test mode
automation: UI: landing hero includes alpha badge text
UI: upgrade modal sandbox notice renders only when billingModeIsTest=true
Unit: billing mode guard rejects mismatched config

acceptanceTests: At least 4 tests added and passing
No sandbox copy leaks into live mode config

notes: Keep alpha messaging subtle but visible on the landing hero; keep sandbox payment disclaimer very prominent inside the Upgrade modal.
